steps.action: Wait 75 seconds for onboarding subagent to create company
steps.expected: Company created with mock wallet address
steps.observed: Company 'Test Agency Co' (id: 191fee08-5fcb-4947-93dd-0b3357a0f144) created with wallet_address set

steps.expected: At least one company row with wallet_address matching mock wallet
steps.observed: Returned 1 company: {id: '191fee08-5fcb-4947-93dd-0b3357a0f144', name: 'Test Agency Co', wallet_address: '0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678'}

steps.action: Query all companies to verify only intended company was updated
steps.expected: Mock wallet appears on the correct company only
steps.observed: 2 companies total: 'Acme Delegation' (wallet_address: null), 'Test Agency Co' (wallet_address: '0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678')

assertions.title: Connected wallet address displayed in header

steps.action: Insert user_onboarding record with onboarding_completed=true to bypass onboarding gate
Navigate to http://localhost:8080 and wait for network idle
steps.expected: Main app (AppShell) renders with cockpit page
steps.observed: AppShell rendered showing 'Test Agency Co' cockpit with sidebar navigation
Header text: 'Toggle SidebarAgencyCockpit0x1234…56781 live runs1 approvals...' — wallet badge visible

steps.action: Take wide-viewport screenshot (1920x1080) showing header with wallet badge
steps.expected: Badge with wallet icon and truncated address visible in top-right header area
steps.observed: Screenshot confirms: Badge '0x1234…5678' with wallet icon visible at top-right of header bar, alongside '1 live runs' and '1 approvals' badges

frictions.description: Onboarding gate blocks access to main app header — had to insert user_onboarding record directly via Supabase REST API to bypass gate and see AppShell with wallet badge
frictions.resolution: Inserted user_onboarding row with onboarding_completed=true for the mock wallet address, then reloaded the page

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-AUTH-003: Supabase companies.wallet_address contains mock wallet '0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678' for company 'Test Agency Co'. VAL-AUTH-004: Header displays truncated wallet '0x1234…5678' in a badge with wallet icon at top-right of AppShell header.
